title: エルムSの後に・わたし、がんばる

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's head back to the dorms already, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Aren't you gonna say "That was fun!"?
Aren't you gonna say "That was fun!"?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It was! It was fun, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Everyone wanted me to win, and I didn't.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I gotta try even harder and get even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I have to get first place! Then, everyone will take
me seriously!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And once everyone takes me seriously, it'll make
them smile even more when I win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara really has changed from her days of
just doing everything for fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She finally has a real hunger for victory.
choice_data_list: Then you better win the next race!
Then you better win the next race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And... I wanna enter a G1!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
G1 races are a big deal, right? So I wanna win
one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara has finally found a race goal! She's
grown more than I thought.
choice_data_list: Then how about the JBC Sprint?
Then how about the JBC Sprint?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a sprint on a dirt course, which is what she
excels at. I think she has a great shot at getting
first!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set our sights on taking first place in the JBC
Sprint!
